title: EarthSciIO native field (expected array)
description: Language-neutral encoding of a native-grid array as a provider's FORMAT/READER returns it: CF-decoded values keyed by the on-disk file_variable name, on the loader's native grid. NO variable-name remap and NO unit_conversion are applied here (those stay in ESS). Used for the conformance corpus's expected arrays.

dtype.description: Logical element type of the native array. Numeric file variables are returned as float64 once CF scale_factor/add_offset are applied; integer file variables without packing are int64/int32; text columns (CSV/JSON) are string.

dims.description: Ordered dimension names (e.g. [time, latitude, longitude] for grids, [index] for points). Row-major (C order) flattening of data follows this order.

shape.description: Length of each dimension, in dims order.

fill_value.description: The native fill/missing sentinel if one survives into the native array, else null. CF _FillValue cells are represented as null in data and compared as NaN.

data.description: Nested array of values with the shape given by shape. null marks a masked/fill element (compared as NaN for numeric fields).
